name: pccx-systemverilog-ide-prototype
description: Experimental local VS Code extension scaffold for the PCCX SystemVerilog IDE prototype; not published.

pccxSystemVerilog.mode.description: Experimental local prototype setting selecting checked-example mode or live CLI mode for prototype commands; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.pythonPath.description: Experimental local prototype Python executable used by the live CLI prototype path; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultSource.description: Experimental local prototype workspace-relative default SystemVerilog source used by live diagnostics; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultLog.description: Experimental local prototype workspace-relative default synthetic xsim-style log used by live diagnostics; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultModule.description: Experimental local prototype default module name used by navigation examples; not a stable API.

pccxSystemVerilog.defaultDeclarationKind.description: Experimental local prototype default declaration kind used by navigation; not a stable API.
